name: Telegram Webhook Self-Heal
description: Attempts to validate Telegram bot tokens, re-register webhook for Chat ID 6683959510, and send a webhook test message. Falls back to notifying via alternate channel if unavailable.

nodes.name: Validate Credentials
nodes.config: // check presence of telegram credentials in n8n and validate via getMe endpoint

body.text: Aurelius webhook self-heal test: please reply with 'YES' to confirm.

nodes.name: Verify Reply & Retry
nodes.config: // Waits for webhook inbound trigger or polls message history; if no 'YES', retries setWebhook up to 3 times

notes: Scaffold requires binding telegram_token and valid webhook base URL in n8n. The workflow will attempt idempotent registration and exponential backoff retries. If webhooks cannot be registered, the workflow will escalate by updating SYSTEM_STATUS.json and creating an incident entry in DIRECTIVES_EVOLUTION.md.
